message:
test(oracle): add 7 conformance tests (216 total), note TEXT affinity gap

New tests: type cast operations, complex subquery in WHERE, COALESCE
chain, multiple aggregates same column, SELECT without FROM, NULL in
UNIQUE index, foreign key queries.

Known gap: TEXT column vs INTEGER literal comparison doesn't apply
numeric affinity (e.g. '42' = 42 returns false).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
